case_title: CAFE RAZZI LLC VS. FEDEX TECHCONNECT INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAFE RAZZI LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FEDEX GROUND PACKAGE SYSTEM, INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,060.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAFE RAZZI LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-25-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-10-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. PLAINTIFF SERVED DEFENDANT THROUGH CERTIFIED MAIL WHICH WAS NOT DONE BY THE COURT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FEDEX GROUND PACKAGE SYSTEM, INC.
NOTICE OF RELATED CASE (CGC-12-517910) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAFE RAZZI LLC AS TO DEFENDANT FEDEX GROUND PACKAGE SYSTEM, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAFE RAZZI LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-10-2012 - JUDGMENT.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY FEDEX TECHCONNECT INC. ON OCT-31-2012 - DENIED. "JUDGMENT AMENDED TO SUBSTITUTE "FEXEX GROUND PACKAGE SYSTEM, INC." FOR "FED EX TECHCONNECT INC." PURSUANT TO REQUEST OF FEDEX GROUND. SERVICE WAIVED", JUDGE HO. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY THOMAS KERESZTT--BUSINESS OWNER. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY TYLER CUSICK--AD MIV SERVICE MANAGER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUENNA HO. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
